text.title: C# Background Services Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable job-shape signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Must the job survive process restarts (durable)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: use Hangfire, Quartz.NET, or a durable broker; BackgroundService is in-memory only

branch.question: Is per-item work CPU-bound > 100ms wall time?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: isolate to a separate Worker host so the API thread pool is not starved
use BackgroundService + Channel.CreateBounded with FullMode.Wait; resolve scoped deps per item
use BackgroundService with poll-loop + CreateScope per iteration

text.example: durability=false → cpu_heavy=false → needs_queue=true → BackgroundService + bounded channel; scope per item; health check tracking last-dequeue timestamp.
